eyeofperception.name: Eye of Perception Enemy Detection
eyeofperception.note: It looks for enemies within this hitbox. At the start, the center is Player and starting with the first bounce it's always the enemy that the Bolt is at.

eyeofperception.name: Eye of Perception
eyeofperception.note: Is done as a chain of attacks starting at the target hit (marking the target for 0.6s) and moving on to the closest enemy that is not marked yet if such an enemy exists.
